title: Document extractions
description: A provenance record: one row a document produced in a domain table (a booking, an itinerary item, a destination, a note). Every derived row traces back to its source document, and re-analysis stays idempotent.

documentId.description: the source document this extraction came from

table.description: the domain table a row was written to, e.g. 'bookings' | 'itinerary_items' | 'destinations' | 'knowledge_notes'

rowId.description: the primary key of the row that was written

confidence.description: 0..1 confidence the analyst had in this extraction; low-confidence bookings become notes, not booking rows
